summary: Plan only. #89589 is an open security-sensitive issue and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling. #89635 is an open contributor PR linked to that report, but merge and fix actions are blocked by job policy and the hydrated ClawSweeper review says it is not merge-ready because it changes shared JSON/text atomic write defaults instead of scoping the 0700 behavior to private state-root writes.

actions.reason: The issue reports state directory permissions being relaxed from 0700 to 0775 by update-check JSON writes, which the artifact classifies as security-sensitive and out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup.
The PR is related to the routed security-sensitive issue and contains potentially useful contributor work, but it is not merge-ready and this plan-mode job is not allowed to merge or repair it.
